betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6PWR Operation & GUI§f

§aMaster the PWR control panel, fuel strategy, and cooling loop!§f

The PWR GUI (right-click controller) gives you full control over your reactor. Here's everything you need to know to operate it safely and efficiently.

§6GUI Layout§f:
§b• Cold Coolant Buffer§f — §e128,000 mB§f, holds fluid to be heated
§b• Hot Coolant Buffer§f — §e128,000 mB§f, stores heated fluid for external use
§b• Fluid Identifier§f — specifies coolant type; must be a valid PWR coolant
§b• Fuel Input§f — auto-distributes fuel to empty rods. One fuel type only!
§b• Fuel Type/Count§f — shows current fuel icon and rod count
§b• Depletion Progress§f — white arrow fills as fuel depletes
§b• Spent Fuel Output§f — hot spent fuel ejected here automatically
§b• Control Rod Extension§f — 0 (full insert) to 100 (full remove), accepts numeric input
§b• Heat Warning§f — ominous glow above 80% heat capacity
§b• Core Heat§f — dial + numeric, base capacity §e10,000,000 TU§f
§b• Hull Heat§f — dial + numeric, max §e10,000,000 TU§f
§b• Total Flux§f — flux between fuel rods and reflectors

§6Fuel Management§f:
§b• Fuel is §eauto-distributed§f to empty rods from the input slot
§b• Adding a full stack at once can cause a rapid uncontrolled reactivity rise
§b• Fuel cannot be removed once inserted
§b• Last few rods deplete §eexponentially slower§f — making full shutdown difficult
§b• Breaking the controller voids all coolant and stored fuel — last resort only

§6Cooling Loop§f:
§b• Access ports on casing handle fluid I/O via fluid ducts
§b• Requires external heat exchanger + boiler to convert heat to steam
§b• Typical coolant quantity: §e10,000–30,000 mB§f depending on heat output
§b• Insufficient coolant leads to rapid meltdown (game ticks at 20/s!)
§b• Heat exchanging heaters self-balance — equilibrium prevents overheating

§6Pros§f: Incredibly safe, stable, 100% modular, no xenon poisoning at low temp, gentlest meltdown, easy automation, 3D design saves chunks.
§6Cons§f: Less efficient than RBMK, expensive, fewer late-game fuels, harder for medium enrichment, no item irradiation.
